label: precedes
description: Indicates canonical or sequence order between books.

label: appears-in
description: Indicates that a character appears in a biblical book.

label: recorded-in
description: Indicates that an event is recorded in a biblical book.

label: anchored-in
description: Indicates that a theme is strongly anchored in a given book.

label: reflects
description: Indicates that a biblical book reflects a doctrinal category.

label: distinct-from
description: Indicates protected distinction between canonically different books.
